evidence_scope: engineering launch-contract evidence only; no performance evidence

tests.command: python -m unittest tests.test_aaai27_front_gate_adapters tests.test_aaai27_queue_cli tests.test_aaai27_queue_controller tests.test_aaai27_queue_models tests.test_aaai27_queue_runtime tests.test_aaai27_queue_scheduler tests.test_aaai27_queue_storage tests.test_aaai27_queue_validation tests.test_evaluate_frozen_checkpoint tests.test_graph_checkpoint_contract tests.test_launch_aaai27_seed100_queue tests.test_method_pass_continuation_adapters tests.test_proposal_adaptive_graph tests.test_proposal_wiring tests.test_risk04_08_queue_safe_adapters tests.test_single_train_checkpoint_retention tests.test_single_train_startup_probe tests.test_text_side_proposal tests.test_r6_launch_contract

static_checks.compileall_command: python -m compileall -q single_train.py scripts tests/test_r6_launch_contract.py tests/test_single_train_startup_probe.py

production_probe_gpu_pids.reason: The pre-deployment immutable source did not contain scripts.aaai27_queue; raw nvidia-smi evidence is retained, and the production probe_gpu_pids(0/1) call is required after r6 source deployment.
